message:
fix(transport): replace single-slot pending_symbol with FIFO staged queue in BufferedSink

The previous implementation used Option<AuthenticatedSymbol> for a single
staged symbol when the buffer was full. If poll_send() was called multiple
times before a flush completed, the debug_assert would fire and subsequent
symbols could be silently dropped or reordered.

Replace pending_symbol with a VecDeque<AuthenticatedSymbol> (staged_symbols)
that preserves FIFO order for callers driving poll_send() directly. The
queue drains into the main buffer during poll_flush() in order, ensuring
no symbol is lost or leapfrogged even under concurrent or backpressured
write patterns.

Also adds audit_index.jsonl entry for this fix (batch 377, TealBeacon).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
